item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 40min Raúl Asencio has been diagnosed with bacterial enterocolitis.
Asencio is curren
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 40min Raúl Asencio has been diagnosed with bacterial enterocolitis.
Asencio is currently at home receiving treatment. His progress will be monitored. 342 141 2 mil 139 mil

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1h BREAKING: Serge Gnabry’s season with FC Bayern is over due to torn adductor.
Germ
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 1h BREAKING: Serge Gnabry’s season with FC Bayern is over due to torn adductor.
Germany staff also believe he will miss the World Cup being out for around 3 months, report @SkySportDE . 475 636 7 mil 356 mil
